breakdown: This PR removes the `_extract_xp_from_player_data` function and replaces it with calls to `extract_character_xp`, while updating XP synthesis in reward boxes to prioritize `xp_awarded` from combat/encounter summaries. The naming is improved with clearer function names. Error handling relies on `coerce_int` and type checks. Type safety is moderate with `Any` types still present. Architecture shows consolidation but XP priority logic is duplicated across multiple sites. Test coverage appears to exist from the title but the diff shows tests for the removed function. Documentation is minimal on new code.
key_changes: Update _synthesize_generic_rewards_box to prioritize xp_awarded from combat_summary and encounter_summary
Replace _extract_xp_from_player_data calls with extract_character_xp throughout codebase
Add isinstance check for combat_summary dict before accessing xp_awarded
